Operation 'listZones' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description lacks details about pagination support, available parameters, and response structure. AI agents need to understand what filtering/sorting options are available and what fields are returned to properly use this operation.

data.current_description: Retrieve a list of all CDN zones in your account
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all CDN zones in your account. Supports filtering and sorting parameters. Returns an array of zone objects containing zone ID, domain, status, and configuration details.
data.reasoning: Description lacks details about pagination support, available parameters, and response structure. AI agents need to understand what filtering/sorting options are available and what fields are returned to properly use this operation.

message: Operation 'createZone' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is minimal and lacks critical information. AI agents need to know required request fields, what the response contains, and the zone lifecycle (pending status). Added details about request requirements, response structure, and side effects of zone creation.

data.description_suggestion: Creates a new CDN zone for content delivery acceleration. Requires zone name and origin domain in the request body. Returns the created zone object with assigned zone ID, status, and configuration. The zone will be in 'pending' status until DNS configuration is completed.
data.reasoning: Original description is minimal and lacks critical information. AI agents need to know required request fields, what the response contains, and the zone lifecycle (pending status). Added details about request requirements, response structure, and side effects of zone creation.

message: Operation 'getZone' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details. Description lacks specificity about what details are returned. AI agents need to understand the response structure and what information is available to determine if this operation provides the data they need.

data.current_description: Retrieve details for a specific CDN zone
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed configuration and status information for a specific CDN zone. Requires the zone ID as a path parameter. Returns the complete zone object including domain, origin settings, cache rules, SSL configuration, and current status.
data.reasoning: Description lacks specificity about what details are returned. AI agents need to understand the response structure and what information is available to determine if this operation provides the data they need.

message: Operation 'deleteZone' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks critical information about irreversibility and side effects. AI agents must understand that this is a destructive operation with permanent consequences before executing it. Added details about the irreversible nature and impact on content delivery.

data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a CDN zone and removes it from your account. Requires the zone ID as a path parameter. This action is irreversible and will immediately stop CDN acceleration for the associated domain. Returns a confirmation response with the deleted zone ID.
data.reasoning: Description lacks critical information about irreversibility and side effects. AI agents must understand that this is a destructive operation with permanent consequences before executing it. Added details about the irreversible nature and impact on content delivery.

message: Operation 'purgeCache' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description is too vague about what can be purged and what the operation returns. AI agents need to understand whether they can purge specific URLs or entire zones, and what response to expect. Added details about optional URL-specific purging, response structure, and cache refresh behavior.

data.current_description: Purge cached content for a zone
data.description_suggestion: Purges cached content from CDN edge servers for a specific zone. Requires zone ID as a path parameter and accepts optional request body with specific URLs or purge rules. Returns a purge job ID and status. Purged content will be re-fetched from origin on next request.
data.reasoning: Description is too vague about what can be purged and what the operation returns. AI agents need to understand whether they can purge specific URLs or entire zones, and what response to expect. Added details about optional URL-specific purging, response structure, and cache refresh behavior.
